title: Style Guide Date Format Correction
body: The current style guide specifies date format as MM/DD/YYYY. This is an error and does not align with the internal editorial standard, which follows ISO 8601. The correct date format should be YYYY-MM-DD. All sections of the style guide that include date examples or date formatting instructions must be updated to use the correct format. The correction plan involves: (1) identifying every occurrence of the incorrect date pattern in the style guide; (2) replacing each with the YYYY-MM-DD format; (3) updating any narrative text that describes the date format to reflect the new standard; (4) notifying the editorial team of the change and the effective date. The article also includes examples: the old format '03/15/2025' should become '2025-03-15'.
